case_title: CACV OF COLORADO,LLC VS. WILLIE CARTER et al

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-14-2006 CONTINUED TO JUN-16-2006 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212, FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CACV OF COLORADO,LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CARTER, WILLIE $4,091.14 PRINCIPAL, $750.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,146.88 INTEREST, $221.30 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,209.32, SEE SCANNED DOC( MAILED)
